content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules unsolicited hourly promotional push notifications with no opt-out, matching metadata claim of "unlimited notifications... EVERY HOUR" (App/NotificationScheduler.swift:8-11, fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:3).
Pierre: Apple explicitly flags recurring, unsolicited marketing pushes as spam under 4.5.3/4.5.4, and this app hardcodes an hourly repeating "hot deal" notification with no opt-out or consent UI mentioned anywhere. The `aps-environment` entitlement is production, so this will actually run. Add explicit opt-in consent language and an in-app way to control/reduce frequency, and avoid marketing copy promising "unlimited" hourly alerts.
